face.structure: Oval-shaped with a slight pointed chin, emphasizing a balanced and symmetrical quality.

eyes.shape: Sharp almond shape with a slight upward tilt
eyes.color: Hazy grey with specks of blue
details: Pronounced darker rim around the iris
Light reflects creating a starburst effect from the pupils
eyes.expression_effect: Deeply analytic with a hint of curiosity

face.expression: Contemplative with a slight upward turn at the corners of the lips

skin.rendering_notes: Soft, diffused lighting enhances natural skin warmth

hair.style: Sleek and straight with a center part
hair.flow: Gently cascading to the shoulders with a natural shine
details: A few stray strands to convey movement

character.aura: Thoughtful and composed with an undercurrent of sharp intelligence

outfit.design: Classic navy with silver piping and a subtle pinstripe pattern
details: Monogrammed school crest on the left chest pocket
Crisp white shirt peeking under the blazer
outfit.fit: Precisely fitted, emphasizing a neat and put-together appearance

composition.framing: Centered at mid-torso, allowing a clear view of the face and upper outfit
composition.pose: Standing with a slight lean forward, suggesting engagement
composition.gesture: Left hand raised with index finger tapping chin as if pondering

background.color_palette: Muted greys and blues with light hints of green
background.details: Unfocused library backdrop with bookshelves blurred into soft shapes
background.rules: Avoid strong contrasts, keep focus on character
